query:
UPDATE quotationItems 
SET closetConfig = (
  SELECT closetConfig 
  FROM quotationItems qi2 
  WHERE qi2.quotationId = (
    SELECT id FROM quotations WHERE quotationNumber = 'COT-2026-1775675643251' AND versionNumber = 3
  ) 
  AND qi2.itemType = 'closet'
  LIMIT 1
)
WHERE quotationId = (
  SELECT id FROM quotations WHERE quotationNumber = 'COT-2026-1775675643251' AND versionNumber = 4
) 
AND itemType = 'closet';
